title: Dawn Bell Demo
description: When she opens her eyes, she finds herself in an unfamiliar old castle—. Dawn Bell Demo is a trial version of the 2D side-scrolling horror adventure Dawn Bell, in which a girl who lost her memory explores a mysterious castle, solving puzzles while uncovering fragments of lost memories.

title: Mysteries of the House (DEMO)
description: You wake up with no memories inside the House, a place where reality bends... lies linger... and someone watching your every move.

title: Morphing Demo
description: Morphing is a 2D adventure puzzle game where you possess the ability of morphing. This power allows you to transform and acquire the traits of certain objects or creatures. Use this unique skill to overcome challenges and explore the world.

title: Market Chain 98 Demo
description: Build your Market Chain in this retro incremental game set inside a nostalgic 90s operating system. Start with a small shop, manage bank loans, expand your logistics hubs, and unlock global upgrades through your Portfolio. Fill your desktop with windows and dominate the market!

title: Mortar and Malady Demo
description: A medieval apothecary simulator where you brew, grind, and sell remedies to earn your place in a wary new town. Solve intricate recipe riddles, manage your resources, and grow your mastery of herbalism to heal the sick and maintain your reputation as the local healer.

title: Custom Corner Demo
description: Experience the cozy atmosphere of Custom Corner in this demo version. Design your own isometric room with over 90 basic items and enjoy lo-fi music. Boost your productivity while working or relaxing with basic assistant tools like a focus timer and a to-do list.

title: Campaign Manager Free Version
description: Campaign Manager is a tool to create worlds, puzzles, and adventures. Game masters can design tabletop RPG campaigns for their players. Escape room style puzzle creators can plan out how their participants must escape. Or interactive stories can be fleshed out with all the possible paths.

title: ZHEN: Shattered Legacy Demo
description: You play as a robot warrior monk sent to the distant lands of Zhen, a fictional, East-Asian inspired world desolated by an ancient war. You begin your journey to challenge the Masters of Kung Fu, become the new Grand Master of the land and restore the righteous way of Kung Fu.

title: Memory Farm Demo
description: 长大以后最怀念的，不是去了多远的地方，而是小时候在院子里跑、在灶台边等的那些日子。拾光小院——七八十年代治愈系种田经营手游，带你回到儿时的慢生活。经营几亩田地看春耕秋收，听夏夜蝉鸣。看着西红柿慢慢变红，苹果悄悄挂满枝头——那种踏实的感觉，像回到了小时候外婆的菜园子。喂养两三家禽鸡舍里咕咕叫着，猪圈里哼哼唧唧，牛棚里“哞哞”地叫着。每天收几个鸡蛋，攒几块猪肉，挤半桶牛奶，日子就这样一天天丰盛起来。起小院炊烟面馆的小笼包要趁热蒸，厨房的红烧肉要慢火炖，西餐厅的汉堡还得认真摆个盘，甜品店嘛……是留给期中考试满分的犒劳。你做的每一道菜，都会有人爱吃。接村邻订单大队的订单墙上，贴着一张张泛黄的纸。王婶要两斤鸡蛋，供销社缺一筐鸡蛋，国营厂订十捆甘蔗...每一张都是街坊邻居的托付。

title: Infernal Depths Demo
description: A journey that takes you deep into the bowels of the earth and into other demonic dimensions. Unravel the mystery of the mines of BRIMSTONE and discover more about this strange world you find yourself in.

title: Typer Survivor Demo
description: Typer Survivor is a fast-paced typing roguelike that will push your typing to the limit. Battle through monster-filled dungeons, level up, and build a run from dozens of upgrades. Earn letters by defeating enemies and spend them at the shop to unlock new characters and character alterations.

title: Escape From Ground Demo
description: Endless jumping adventure demo with procedural levels, enemies, and unique biomes.

title: Once Upon a Time… After the End Demo
DEATH CASINO Demo
description: Spend a lifetime at the Death Casino! Russian Roulette meets tabletop strategy in a high stakes duel between you and a glassen maniac. Stay on top of ever escalating complexity as each round introduces more and more mechanics. Juggle guns, knives, drinks, cards and more to survive the Death Casino!

title: Damnation84 No Man's Land Demo
description: Damnation84 is a fast-paced FPS game that uses impulse and propulsion weapons as a means of movement and combat. In this devastated world, eliminate enemies in sequence and complete the levels before your oxygen runs out. You are the last hope, survive and cause damnation.

title: Mother ZERO Demo
description: In Mother ZERO, a cyberpunk action-adventure game, fight your way through a decaying world full of mysteries and threats. Explore deep underground bunkers, battle corrupted creatures, and encounter bizarre characters.

title: Picatso Demo
description: Play as Picatso, a calico cat painter searching for a creative spark. Navigate through underground ruins with his ability to paint the environment which allow him to advance in this platforming adventure!

title: Goat's Odyssey Demo
description: Play the free Demo! Just a goat. A boring peg. And a postcard that changed everything. Begin a surreal point & click journey in a unique shadow theatre style. Escape the village garden, solve absurd puzzles, and help our horned heroine take her first steps to the stars.

title: Reel Greed Demo
description: A chaotic slot machine incremental where tiny payouts become screen-filling money explosions. Collect falling cash, pick powerful cards, and upgrade toward absurd jackpots.

title: FlockSol Demo
description: FlockSol is an incremental top-down survival game. Light up the dark and defeat the monsters hiding inside. Spend their essences to unlock and upgrade your skills. Summon your past souls to fight alongside you. Reach your full potential, survive the night and cleanse the world of darkness.

title: DeadWave Demo
description: Chaotic co-op zombie survival where every round escalates into panic. Earn credits, gamble on pickups, trigger devastating nukes, and try to keep your friends alive as hordes and bosses overwhelm beautifully crafted locations with unique playable characters.

title: Forensic Finish Demo
description: A first-person psychological horror game set in the 1970s where you clean crime scenes, remove biohazards, and restore disturbing locations using experimental cleaning equipment. Scrub surfaces, dispose of remains, explore eerie environments, and uncover increasingly unsettling paranormal activity.

title: Dread Disc Demo
description: A strange game disc appears at your door. Every difference you spot changes your apartment while something unknown tries to find a way inside.

title: ImpossiBall Demo
description: Casual indie game, Player controls a ball through two unlocked levels. Each level offers varying difficulties as the player progresses. The aim is to colllect a range of pickups, each worth varying points. Think pinball arcade game with a twist. Can you do the ImpossiBall and complete both levels?

title: OVER SAND Demo
description: Take to the steampunk skies! Defend your flying ship over endless sands from mechanical hordes. Master turret firepower, switch weapons, and craft synergistic perk builds mid-wave. No movement — pure skill!

title: Deepest Darkest Demo
description: Deepest Darkest is a 90s as hell and metal as hell boomer shooter. Shoot your way through an action packed single player campaign with an arsenal of weapons, power up and magic spells as you tear though an army of cultists and monsters.

title: Feed The Forest Demo
description: A short, innocent incremental forest-builder. Unlock snail powers to spread life in a barren desert. Feed the mysterious Forest with juice. And remember: Blood is a type of juice.

title: Medieval Halloween VR Demo
description: Halloween themed semi open world Monster Shooter Game with a Medieval Setting. Clear out enemies, collect artifacts and solve puzzles to summon boss fights. Simple shoot 'em up chaos and good fun.

title: Axiom Of Echoes: Proof Refactor Demo
The Incentive Program Demo
description: A strategic roguelike set in a surreal corporate nightmare. You’re paid to play, but you won’t win. So rig the odds, exploit the rules, and escape the program.

title: Cohen 1939 Demo
description: 1939. Birmingham. In this brutal, fast-paced top-down action shooter, become Elisa – a grief-stricken widow seeking vengeance for her gangster husband. In a city choking on conspiracy and violence, you are judge, jury, and executioner.

title: Dimension Rift : Otaku Save The World Demo
CastleOn Scriptum Demo
description: Build a castle and defend it from your enemies! Construct towers, place traps, train and command units in this historical, manuscript-themed mix of Tower Defense and classical Real Time Strategy.

title: Dendron 64 Demo
description: With the help of a talented team of coders, a portion of the alpha build of Dendron 64 has been recovered and adapted for playability on computers.
developer: Evelyn Beck, Susan Rennings, Donnie Merchant

title: Split Happens! Demo
description: Sharing is caring. But can you cut any object perfectly in half? In Split Happens! you try to do exactly that. Sit back, relax, and slice hundreds of objects exactly in half.

title: Abyss Horde Demo
description: Darkness tears reality apart. Hordes of beasts, monsters, and abyssal demons surge from the depths—mindless, driven only by destruction. Adventurer, the line needs you! In 《Abyss Horde》, defend against ever-stronger waves. Every run builds a new defense; every upgrade shifts the tide.

title: Upbaka! Demo
description: A chaotic roguelite where every floor is a mess, the enemies don’t know what they’re doing, and neither do you. Fight, loot, and climb the tower... or die trying.

title: LogiGolf Demo
description: LogiGolf is a relaxing golf puzzle game where you place walls to guide the ball. Journey between islands to uncover new challenges and surprising discoveries.

title: Arcanum Nights Demo
description: This is a pixel-style puzzle game where you can enjoy new gimmicks. Light up the nights of Oenothera, Helian, and Arcanum.

title: Don't mess with Er Kui_Demo
description: This is a demo version of Don't Mess With Er Kui, an action pixel indie game currently in development. The full version is coming soon—stay tuned!
developer: Rizhao Youdian Yisi Animation Design Co., Ltd.

title: Inscrutable FourDC -Imprisonment- Demo
description: In this demo version, only Q1 is selectable.

title: 再见犹丽迪茜 Demo
description: 《再见犹丽迪茜demo》是《再见犹丽迪茜》的demo版本。高三艺考生李莫正处于低谷期。某天放学，他在本应空无一人的出租屋客厅里，遇见了一位陌生少女。她自称“犹丽迪茜”，很是古怪，却从此自然而然地闯入了他的生活。玩家将在游玩过程中体验一份别样的校园青春恋爱，并在结局处做出抉择。

title: 长生立志传 Demo
description: Welcome to the demo of Eternal Life: A Cultivation Saga.The game is currently still in development, with a playable demo expected to be released soon.

title: Escape the Grind Demo
description: Free demo. Can you retire before 65? A financial life sim across 10 real economies with real salaries, real housing, real decisions. Easy mode unlocked here. Medium, Hard, and Play Your Life mode in the full game.

title: Slime in the Ice Machine Demo
description: All truly great bars are concretely connected through psychotropic liquid doorways. Solve surreal puzzles and acquire esoteric skills as you bar crawl through history, metaphysics, and vice.

title: BLOODY RAVE Demo
description: Experience stealth, survive horror and dark secrets under the desert night at the biggest vampire rave party of the year!

title: SURI: The Seventh Note Demo
description: A rhythm-action platformer where every move syncs to the music. Dash, jump, and escape through a mystical world shaped by rhythm to save your mother’s life. Rhythm was the life of the island of Suri, who will step up when its harmony is broken?

title: Idle Cult Demo
description: Build your cult In this incremental breakout roguelite where you'll upgrade powerful Orbs and absorb Bricks' souls. Use the souls you earn to summon powerful followers to fight for you, give you unique abilities, and enact the Final RItual.

title: Colorace Demo
description: It will be an extraordinary ride! Drive your car through walls made of colored blocks, collect useful power-ups and overcome obstacles on the way.

title: Animagi Demo
description: Animagi is a magical cooperative game where you build, purify, and defend spiritual biomes while facing chaotic creatures in fast-paced matches full of action and strategy.

title: Null Carrier Demo
description: Operate a deep-space listening array in this minimalist signal-reconstruction puzzle game. Tune frequencies, isolate transmissions from noise, and classify patterns for Command. But as the shifts go by, you begin to realize: the signals aren't from where you thought, and Command is lying to you.

title: Mouseward Demo
description: Play the opening of Mouseward and get introduced to the world of Terrene. Take up your sword and uncover the secrets of a cursed kingdom in this soulslike collectathon. Awaken as a Royal Mouse Guard, master combat, defeat foes and search for celestial fragments to restore a once great kingdom.

title: BCKSPCE Demo
description: WELCOME TO SPECTRE OS. It’s the early 2000s, and your computer screen is your entire world. Spectre OS gives you a fully functional, highly nostalgic retro desktop. Connect with friends on the messenger app, organize your .

title: Exium: Theia Demo
description: Explore the hostile planet of Theia in this open-world action RPG. Scavenge, fight, craft, and uncover the secrets hidden beneath a world controlled by Vexx Industries.

title: Galaxy Invaders - Eclipse Squadron Demo
description: Galaxy Invaders is an action-packed space shooter where you pilot a powerful starfighter through intense cosmic battles. Dodge enemy fire, destroy alien fleets, upgrade your weapons, and conquer epic boss fights to save the galaxy.

title: House of Anomalies Demo
description: Explore a shifting haunted house alone or with friends in online co-op. Watch every room carefully, uncover disturbing anomalies, and question what is real as the house grows stranger with every new discovery.

title: Against the Dark Moon Demo
description: Free playable demo of Against the Dark Moon, a heroic fantasy poker roguelike. Build a party of heroes, score with poker hands, and defeat the Dark Moon Invocation.

title: Aschente Demo
description: Shape how your magic moves, splits, chains, and explodes across the battlefield in firework-like bursts of chaos!

title: Under the Eye Demo
description: The world and regime you once knew is crumbling day by day. The Major won't let you go until you've beat her at her own twisted card game. Bid, cheat and bend the rules to see another day, or die and be forgotten.

title: Astral Industrial Complex Demo
description: A space automation game with rogue lite elements. Take the role of a rogue defense drone building up a mining and defense industry in the far reaches of space.

title: The Recipe for Life. A Journey Through Silent Apocalypses Demo
description: You are a wanderer with a cracked soul and a home on wheels. Your task is to hear the voices of those who want to take their own lives, and to find the right words before they fall silent forever.

title: BBS (Bulletin Board System) Magica Demo
description: Magical Girl Programming ✖︎ Auto Battle!This is an auto-battle shooting game in which Kurumi, a former magical girl office worker, manages a bulletin board to support herself and aims for early retirement with the proceeds. Bulletin boards are under constant threat.

title: Battle Nap Demo
description: Battle Nap is a roguelite top-down shooter where your picnic nap becomes an explosive journey into dreamland domination. Build your arsenal, stack your perks, and blast through your subconscious to ensure you don’t wake up until the job is done. Don't wake up - the fight is just getting good!

title: lunr.rdio.taxi/demo
description: lunr.rdio.taxi blends drifting and rhythm into an exhilarating spacetime 'DRIFTHM' adventure! Slide and boost your way through the solar system to the beat of Brazil's best DJs and earn big as an interplanetary taxi pilot trying to pay an infinite debt in this hypercapitalistic BrazaFunk future.

title: Cutout Village Demo
description: Enjoy the calm of village life and spark your creativity in this building and crafting game inspired by cutout books.

title: Warhammer Survivors Demo
description: Immerse yourself in the bullet heaven from hell with the Warhammer Survivors demo! Overcome an onslaught of deadly enemies spawned from the iconic Warhammer 40,000 and Warhammer Age of Sigmar universes.

title: Wallpaper Animator Demo
description: Use animated wallpapers on your desktop. Explore hundreds of wallpapers from the community library or buy the full version to create your own with AI.

title: Symbiosis Demo
description: A solo or coop hero-shooter set in a procedural alien world. Explore, build, evolve, and fight side-by-side against waves of mechanical hybrids. Wishlist now!

title: Thalassic Dice Demo
description: Sail the seas in this tactical roguelike dice-rolling game. Assemble your crew, battle sea monsters, sail through hazardous waters and escape ship wrecking storms. Manage and upgrade your ship and recruit and train new crewmates at your own port. What secrets are hiding beneath the waves?

title: Reborn Arena Demo
description: RebornArena is a competitive 2D platformer arena shooter where elemental deck-building meets precise combat. Draft your powers, master custom kinematic movement, and evolve your build every round. Outplay rivals in a skill-based arena where tactical choices are as vital as your aim.

title: Jarred Defense Demo
description: A maze-building tower defense where tower placement is everything. Force enemies the long way around, build choke points, push through lava, and adapt as levels change beneath you. No spells, no card modifiers. Just planning, placement, and a cat stuck in a jar.

title: Twofold Tower: Prologue
description: Shift between dimensions, and sidestep undead skeletons – then juggle both at once! Twofold Tower is a turn-based puzzler, and this prologue takes place before the events of the main game, and contains unique puzzles and content.

title: Treetopians Demo
description: Treetopians is a cozy colony simulator where players build vertical villages in the treetops and care for a growing community of villagers with unique needs and personalities.

title: Mecharise Demo
description: Mecharise is a strategy and tower defense game that combines elements of base building, resource management, and wave-based combat against hostile aliens. Pilot a mecha as you colonize new worlds and defend your base against enemy attacks.

title: Unbowed Demo
description: Unbowed is a single-player pirate-inspired action RPG blending methodical Soulslike combat, oppressive atmosphere, and cosmic horror.

title: Screamer - Demo
description: Jump into the demo of Screamer and get a taste of the most brutal racing showdown!

title: DDoD Demo
description: DDoD is a top-down roguelite shooter with gunplay that feels right and charming mutants you'll love, or hate. Explore a massive open world above and underground. Cleanse the Purple Lands solo or in co-op. Come back alive. Or not.

title: Neon Pulsefire Demo
description: Fullfill your ultimate power fantasy and defeat endless waves of enemies in this challenging sci-fi bullet-hell roguelite. Unlock unique classes and upgrades to create powerful builds as you weave your way through enemies, arena hazards and projectile assaults.

title: Hanox Demo
description: Slide every block at once, stack them in the right weight order, and master elegant grid-based puzzles built around momentum, planning, and chain merges. Avoid invalid stacks, think several moves ahead, and turn each level into a perfectly crafted solution.

title: 虚空斗盘 Demo
description: This is a high-contrast grid-based tactical Roguelike. A unique attachment system synergizes with your 5-slot inventory to create specialized tactics, while adapting to dynamic events each turn is the key to survival. Precisely calculate every point of stamina.

title: The Shu Legend Demo
description: 《The Shu Legend》 is an interactive fiction adventure. In a war-torn apocalypse ruled by a canine race, protagonist Shi Jin becomes a bandit to survive. The demo covers his initial struggles and his first encounter with a mysterious race...

title: 糺糺縁糸（きゅうきゅうえんし） Demo
Memory of Memorie : A Chill Story Demo
description: A story-driven productivity adventure where you work alongside Memorie, an apprentice witch from another world. As you focus using the Pomodoro timer, the story progresses and her world gradually transforms. This demo offers ~4 hours through Chapter 5 — save data carries over to the full game.

title: WINGMINE Demo
description: WINGMINE is a narrative puzzle game inspired by Minesweeper, entirely based on logic. Your special unit has been scattered behind enemy lines: analyze the terrain, defuse the mines, and save your team.

title: DeadWeight: A Lullaby Demo
description: A baby fell. You jumped after it. God didn't like that. DeadWeight: A Lullaby is a psychological narrative experience about guilt, judgment, and the weight of human intent.

title: The Great Beyond Demo
description: This demo gives you 2 missions, a starter guide, and various challenges!

title: Rong Demo
description: Battle your way through a dystopian internet in this Rogue-Like Ping-Pong adventure. Battle a variety of enemies in virtual ping pong matches that twist the concept to its extremes.

title: CORE Demo
description: CORE is a "Retro" style fps or rather fpp [first person puncher?] about a robot going into the earth and destroying it from the inside out.

title: Atlas Zone Demo
description: We combined Card and Roguelike genres. On top of that, we added a grid-based map mechanic. Build a unique deck, encounter different producers, and form a magnificent team. Develop your skill tree with your team. Control the entire region with your team.

title: Sheep & Socks Demo
description: Guide goofy flocks of sheep and produce fancy socks in this frantic couch coop game! Good coordination with your fellow shepherd dogs is key to meet the animal clients demand. Get ready and bark away!

title: SLOP Crew Demo
description: SLOP Crew is an online co-op survival horror game where teamwork, communication, and poor decisions collide. Explore procedurally generated levels using positional voice to survive the darkness. Collect SLOP to travel and explore entire planets and varied cave systems in your quest for glory.

title: Pet the Cat - Demo
description: The demo of Pet the Cat is now available! In this lighthearted yet intense bullet-hell shooter, unleash attacks by “petting the cat” to fend off waves of relentless enemies! Experience the core gameplay and get an early taste of raising your cat into a battlefield powerhouse!

title: Chess Tales Demo
description: Lead your chess army beyond the 8x8 board into the opening chapters of an enchanted world. Solve environmental puzzles across three unique realms in this first glimpse of Chess Tales.

title: Dig Too Deep Demo
description: Throw goblins at all your problems! Don't miss or your goblins will get shredded. Angry baddies want to turn you to pulp! Stop them the only way you know how: throwing goblins! Build defenses. Craft upgrades. Choose Perks. Defend your Base! An Action Tower Defense game.

title: CH13: Rest Stop Demo
description: Rest Stop is a psychological horror game set in early 2000s Poland. What begins as a calm drive through the woods turns into something you weren't prepared for... Will you find out what awaits at the end of the road?

title: Vacuum Survivors Demo
description: Not really a bullet hell, nor a bullet heaven… is there such thing as bullet earth? Fight against steady hordes and brutal bosses as you level up, collect stronger weapons, and stack powerful upgrades in this survivor-like shoot-’em-up.

title: Eerie Dossier:the Haunted House Observation Log Demo
description: Eerie Dossier:The Haunted House Observation Log is a click-based mouse game of the horror genre. You will assume the role of an employee engaged in monitoring strange occurrences, and reporting various anomalies through a control panel.

title: Gridhammer Demo
description: GridHammer is a turn-based tactical game where two forge masters draw from the same cache of plates — each with four numbered edges. Place a plate next to your rival's and the higher number captures. Five Houses bring distinct strengths to the board, and their rivalries fuel combo chains that cascade captures across the grid.

title: The Vaults Below Durn: A Field Study Demo
Legacy of Sail Demo
description: As a 17th Century Admiral, send your squadrons out to capture enemy towns and sink their ships. Force boarding actions to capture their prized Ships of the Line all while balancing the need for supplies, repairs and upgrading your crew in this throwback real time tactics naval combat game

title: You had a bad dream Demo
description: A minimalist horror game where you move through procedurally generated narrow corridors and avoid lurking monsters.

title: SunderBound Demo
description: SunderBound is a co-op top-down shooter with roguelite progression, set in a crumbling mega-tower. Survive floor by floor with a partner you trust, or an AI companion if you’re climbing solo. Every room’s a test. Every upgrade’s earned. And the only way out is up.

title: Yaoguai Compendium Demo
description: Yaoguai Compendium is a strategic roguelike idle game featuring equipment synthesis, build crafting, and tower climbing. It delivers a light-paced, casual experience while offering solid strategic.A strange Yaoguai aura suddenly sweeps across Shenzhou. Cultivation sects march out to roam the world.

title: Mega Roids Demo
description: Play Stage 1 of Mega Roids free in this fast-paced first-person 3D asteroid shooter. Blast rocks open for loot, fight off alien raiders, and wishlist the full game for Stage 2 now and Stage 3 coming in June.

title: Subsomnia Demo
description: Explore an ever-changing dream universe in this 2.5D action roguelite. Wield your slingshot, solve physics-based ricochet puzzles, and traverse procedural worlds. Every magical object is a gateway to a new dream: will you reach the source?

title: Catagon Demo
description: In this Roguelike Action Shooter, battle against your carnal enemies in various fast paced combat scenarios, swarming rats and nightmarish skulls must be defeated and all the fish must be caught!

title: Cellular Soup Demo
description: A short active incremental game about growing your cellular organism. Make the numbers go up by absorbing all kinds of cells in the primordial soup of evolution!

title: Tidy Backpack: In the Faraway Lands Demo
description: Tidy Backpack: In the Faraway Lands is a relaxing puzzle game where you must organize found futuristic loot in your backpack in a tidy way. Find unknown artifacts and learn details about the faraway lands... at least supposedly!

title: BrokenLore: ASCEND Demo
description: The demo of BrokenLore: ASCEND is a first-person psychological horror experience featuring climbing and stealth mechanics. Follow two rooftop climbers as they confront a cursed tower and the terrifying Rokurokubi. The higher they climb, the closer they come to madness.

title: Mushroom Trip Demo
description: A psychedelic platformer with roguelike-inspired progression, focused on risk and mental balance. Face unstable worlds, use powerful abilities at a psychological cost, and survive repeated runs where perception and difficulty slowly unravel.

title: Endless TD Demo
description: A simple yet unending tower defense game with a mix of idling and incremental progress. Tons of upgrades to purchase and endless progress to achieve.

title: Not Sleep Hero Demo
description: "Not Sleep Hero" is a turn-based strategy game. Your goal is to make the best decisions each turn to overcome approaching threats and safely complete your expedition.  Unlike the Hero's courageous actions, their companions are so sleepy that they might not be much help.

title: Turning point Demo
description: Turning point is a narrative-driven puzzle platformer, full of twists and turns. Learn to listen to the voices that somehow-someway you hear. Based on narration find your way out.

title: 神祇Pantheon Demo
description: Dark Matter God × unemployed girl. A two-way redemption otome visual novel.

title: 回魂者 CallBacker Demo
description: Join us to playtest, give your thoughts, and help shape the game!

title: Lucky Shot Demo
description: The flick-shot roguelite FPS. Sharpen your aim, master different weapons, and break the game to reach massive high scores.

title: CODE EXIT Demo
description: Enter Pantheon, a futuristic city swallowed by darkness and ruled by a rogue AI. Team up with up to 4 players and survive an adaptive pursuer that learns from every mistake. Complete the mission, uncover Minerva’s secrets, and find a way out before the city consumes you.

title: Heart Duels Demo
description: Heart Duels is a tactical single-player card battler where positioning matters. Build your deck, duel ranked NPCs, collect their cards, uncover their stories, and climb the ranks to become the King of Duels. Challenge your friends to duels in multiplayer!

title: DEBUG NEPHEMEE Demo
description: DEBUG NEPHEMEE is a top-down 2D adventure game set in a world infested with bugs. Through a unique battle system and encounters with a colorful cast of characters, you will embark on a journey to "Debug" the world.

title: The Punchbag Machine Demo
description: Pixel-neon rhythm roguelite. Notes fall, punch to the beat, six strike directions, 27 machines. Collect punch cards, stack artifacts, hold the combo — miss the score target and the run is over.

title: Mana Runner Demo
description: Mana Runner is a 2D retro-cyberpunk RPG featuring a real-time action battle system. Traverse the dystopian streets of an alternate 1997 New Orleans. Hire Hackers, Enforcers, Mana Priests, and other specialists as you fight back against the corruption of the mega-corps.

title: Hulljackers Demo
description: Run a galactic pirate syndicate from a single screen. Raid ships, loot cargo, capture crew, and grow a fleet that raids in parallel while you watch. An incremental space-pirate idle game with tactical raids, a reputation-based black market, and a legendary endgame.

title: MINOS INITIATIVE - 2112 Demo
description: Explore 5 Floors of a dark scifi future where truth lies deeper than expected

title: Super Shout Showdown Demo
description: Cast spells with your voice like an anime character! Battle in duels, team fights, or chaotic free-for-all matches with 25+ unique spells to learn, combo, and master.

title: Moto Trial Turbo Demo
description: Moto Trial Turbo is a physics-based 2D arcade motorcycle trial game. Players can look forward to exciting tracks, devious traps, secrets, and even player-created levels! Complete challenging tracks against the clock and compete with players from around the world on the leaderboards.

title: Nova Impact Demo
description: Pilot your ship and survive the arena! Test the core loop of this unique Space RPG: dodge, shoot, and build your perfect loadout (capped at lvl 15). Prove your worth by climbing the V.O.I.D. leaderboard to fight alongside the Champion in an intense score-attack phase.

title: The Hidden Evils Club Demo
description: Try the first defense missions of Weird Hill and survive against escalating zombie waves. Build towers, manage resources, meet survivors, and face the growing threat hidden beneath the town.Demo IncludesDefend the first district of Weird HillBuild and upgrade defensive towersManage resources and town suppliesMeet survivor NPCs and trade...

title: Terminal Cursor Demo
description: Terminal Cursor is a fast‑paced reflex arcade game where you dodge evolving bullet patterns and survive as long as possible. Every movement matters. Features intense runs, rising difficulty, high‑score focus, and an original soundtrack by David‑Ștefan Horecica.

title: Disarray Demo
description: Disarray is a dark survival horror experience where you are tasked with surviving the night against an infestation of savage vampires. After receiving a letter about inheriting a property from a relative you never knew existed, you arrive unaware of the dark secrets waiting to be uncovered.

title: Bench Simulator Demo
description: Bench Simulator is a narrative-driven simulation game where you experience the world from the perspective of a silent park bench. In this demo, you play through a specially crafted single day. Throughout the day, 3 different groups visit the park.

title: Fleshborn Demo
description: A short incremental game where you are tasked to clean a research facility from fleshy growths using your flamethrower. Collect resources and spend them in a vast upgrade tree to unlock new abilities.

title: Choo Choo Defenders Demo
description: Build your track, assemble your train and deliver cargo and carnage in equal amounts in this on-the-rails take on tower defense! This demo lets you play the first world as much as you'd like!

title: 探偵Rと預言者J Demo
description: Gather evidence and uncover the truth through your interactions with others in this mystery adventure game about a case where past and present collide.

title: ThrustX Demo
description: Start as Santa. Unlock a pig, a cop and more. Beat each other senseless in a chaotic 2.5D brawler, with proximity chat, so you can hear them suffer. New fighters every season with a free season pass. Best of five. May the most unhinged player win.

title: Orca Insurgency Demo
description: Play as an orca in a fast-paced ocean rebellion against yachts, whalers, and human greed. Smash boats, rescue your pod, command other orcas, hunt with echolocation, and test absurd weapons from a mysterious octopus arms dealer. The Orca Insurgency begins.

title: Idle AI Factory Demo
description: Dive into the world of machine learning! Idle AI Architecture is a node-based automation incremental game where you harvest resources and train neural networks. Manage your economy, optimize your grid, and automate your way to a multi-million dollar tech empire.

title: ComboChain Pulse Demo
description: ComboChain Pulse is a fast-paced sci-fi arcade shooter where you chain massive combos, destroy enemy fleets, and survive intense bullet-hell battles across futuristic warzones. Master powerful weapons, shields, and lightning-fast combat.

title: Dave's House Demo
description: In this frantic first-person co-op horror, answer the phone before Grandma eats you! Cook the food exactly as ordered, or she’ll eat you! Throw the food on the table and hide—don’t let it fall, or she'll eat you! If she finds you, RUN! If she catches you... don't get eaten!

title: Tattoo Shop Simulator Demo
description: Run your dream tattoo shop! Provide tattoo and piercing services, customize your shop, and manage staff. Unlock new skills and roam the living city freely on your motorcycle. Buy real estate, fight off thugs, and grow from a small shop into the city's biggest brand!

title: Face the Puzzle: Masked Journey Demo
Find Eat Hide Till Dawn Demo
Remain At Your Desk Demo
description: Incremental hacker about faking productivity while stealing from your employer. Sell intel for credits or keep it and raise suspicion. One bad audit and you’re back to Intern.

title: Tokyo Re:Connect Demo
description: Spring is the season of first meetings. Begin your new life in the city of Tokyo as Shindou Touki. Meet many colorful characters, forge romances, and live out your high-school days, in this interactive story with cutting-edge artwork and a moving soundtrack.

title: 界墨山河 (INK Mountains And Rivers) Demo
description: 《INK Mountains And Rivers》is a casual ink style idle collection and cultivation game, with themes taken from worldviews similar to Shanhai and Honghuang. It is a mountain and river world full of exotic beasts. Here, you can collect various exotic beasts, cultivate them to become stronger.

title: The Swashbugglers Demo
description: A cartoon-style 2D roguelike autochess focused on tactical strategy. Recruit insect "heroes" from the forest to form a team. Develop their skills, equipment, and stone inscriptions through battles to defeat the source of chaos within the time limit.

title: Tartaria: Frozen Frontier Demo
description: Lead your clan, build settlements, and survive enemy raids in a turn-based strategy set in the harsh northern lands.

title: XX Fulfillment Center Demo
description: You've been hired as a Part-Time Contract Packaging Worker at the fulfillment center.Can you find your own happiness amid the speeding conveyor belts and ever-growing list of rules?

title: Watch Out: Shark! Demo
description: 2D pixel art arcade survival. Brave the ocean's dangers, face the shark, and chase the high score!

title: 極书院演义 Demo
description: A power struggle grips the Polar Academy. As student Yin Tian begins his 2½-year studies, the Emperor and Prince Yan scour the school for talents to use in their conflict. In this elite ..

title: One Dumb Wizard Demo
description: One Dumb Wizard is an action roguelike where you play as a wizard hell-bent on getting their money back from the Bartender. Find charms to power up your wand, parts to craft new wands, and strategically sling spells in your singular mission to GET YOUR MONEY BACK.

title: Don't Mind the Robots Demo
description: Outsmart the robots in this strategic tower defense game. Build deadly mazes, upgrade your towers, and unlock powerful perks. Every decision matters as you adapt your defenses against increasingly stronger waves of AI-infested opponents.

title: One Last Hand Demo
description: Poker meets Battle Royale in One Last Hand, a 2-6 players chaotic party game where poker gets deadly! Forget fair play: attack your rivals with powerful hands, fight for better cards in secret auctions, and bend the rules with powerful relics in thrilling online multiplayer matches.

title: ENDLESS SAMURAI Demo
description: One Strike. Total Tension. A Japanese parry-driven roguelite that blends turn-based depth with fast-paced action. Master the parry. Control the battle.

title: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales Prologue Demo
description: Carry your save data over to the full version of the game in this new prologue demo! Enjoy the opening chapter of the story with the same freedom of adventure as in the full game. Progress in the main quest, explore the unknown, or hunt down new weapons and magicite—the future is up to you.

title: Black Mountain of Tlaltecuhtli  Demo
description: Cinematic Third‑Person Action horror game Climb sheer rock faces, leap across collapsing ruins, and engage in tight, cover‑based firefights against hostile factions who are just as desperate and just as trapped as you. While trying to escape something so evil and primal, civilization ending.

title: The Long Wake: What Remains Observed Demo
description: The town is empty. The nightmare isn’t. A third-person 3D survival horror game with roguelike elements and knowledge-based mechanics. Explore a deserted town trapped in a relentless loop, where each attempt reveals new paths, tools, and truths, escape before time runs out.

title: Lured In Demo
description: Run your own cozy aquarium! Travel to different places to catch all types of fish. Bring them back for idle profits, or sell them for instant cash. Unlock research for new upgrades, and ascend for powerful bonuses. Customize your character and tanks, and make your aquarium your own!

title: Just Prices Demo
description: A sign-language based point-and-click adventure sci-fi game

title: Galactic Speed Legends Demo
description: Compete at full speed in high-stakes sci-fi races. A fast-paced arcade racer where precision timing is everything. Maintain your momentum and push your limits.

title: Don't Get Fired! Demo
description: The company is going under and corporate has made YOU the office manager. Turn things around quick or everyone's doomed. Run the office, keep employees productive, and avoid disasters. Muscle through the workday or automate the grind. Play solo or with friends — just Don't Get Fired!

title: Magnavis Demo
description: Magnavis is a first-person 3D horror game for 1–4 player co-op. Pilot your submarine through tight caves without crashing, complete assigned missions, repair damaged systems, and whatever you do, don’t die.

title: Grey Wake Demo
description: In an intimate narrative-driven exploration game, wake up on a forgotten island between life and death equipped with only a compass, a telescope, and a weathered sailboat. Chart the haunted archipelago, relive faded memories, and uncover the truth about what, and who, you came here to find.

title: Traveler Stories: Journeys of Real People Demo
description: "Is this really the life you want?" A visual novel with simple life-sim elements, based on 80% true stories from world travelers. Step behind the bar in Tokyo, encounter extraordinary lives, and challenge your values. A simulation to rediscover yourself and open the door to a "new you."

title: DEEP DIVER Demo
description: Can you become the most skilled diver capable of reaching the deepest depths on Earth? Every second you spend underwater will become more mysterious, and every meter deeper will be more dangerous. Upgrade your diver with 30 different abilities and skill trees, and try to survive.

title: Team Rocket Project Demo
description: Team Rocket Project Demo played with 1-4 players is set in a retro futuristic world where you guide a rocket! Wield one or more of the 4 thrusters of the rocket and propel it to your destination! Adventure in unique levels, avoid traps and get the highest score! Two levels available in the demo!

title: Moon Garden Demo
description: A cozy incremental game about growing your way home. Strategically plant flowers, optimize machinery, and grow your tree tall enough to escape!

title: Underwater Duo Demo
description: In Underwater Duo, control a smashing turtle with your left hand and a blasting jellyfish with your right! Fight off waves of fierce fish, grow stronger, and see if your two hands can conquer the deep… or team up with a perfectly in-sync partner.

title: DRUMP SIMULATOR Demo
description: A satirical game where you make choices as President Tonald Drump.

title: Where the Echo Sleeps Demo
description: <Where the Echo Sleeps> is a story-driven hospital receptionist simulator with multiple endings. Become a hospital receptionist in a pandemic apocalypse and manage the order in which patients receive treatment.

title: Patchkins Party Demo
description: Patchkins is a multiplayer racing game for 2 to 6 players where you build the course as you play. Each round, players draw and place objects like Platforms, Obstacles, and Specials, then race to the finish without dying.

title: Dolf Demo
description: Underwater mini-golf with cybernetic dolphins. Online multiplayer for 1-8 players.

title: Rhythm Survivors Demo
description: Rhythm Survivors is a single player musical survivor-like. Fight off hordes of increasingly numerous monsters while collecting upgrades to compose powerful sequences of attacks. Only with perfect rhythm can you hope to survive the night!

title: Deeper Demo
description: Go on expeditions with your friends to explore the depths in search of treasures, upgrade your gear, and dive back in deeper.

title: Your Own Cozy Motel Demo
description: Build and run your own roadside motel in a hands-on simulator. Check in guests, clean and repair rooms, manage payments, upgrade facilities, and grow from a small stopover into a thriving, high-reputation business.

title: Man in the Mocha Demo
description: An active incremental game where you own a coffee shop, but your hidden agenda is to hack your customers' devices, steal their data and sell it on the black market for some dirty money. Good thing you've got a coffee shop to launder it! Use your money to buy upgrades and grow your business.

title: PredaDeck Demo
description: PredaDeck is a trading card game that transforms the brutal yet exquisite real-world food chain into a competitive strategic duel. Here, knowledge is your sharpest claw, and strategy is your only law of survival.

title: Flounder Demo
description: The Ocean Ecosystem Roguelite. Grow a colorful school of fish with unique abilities and unlock powerful items to help them repel boss invasions. Collect rare fish to complete your peaceful Virtual Tank. Hold the line and surface victorious! The depth is deceiving.

title: Dread Admiral Demo
description: A turn-based naval roguelite where every ship you lose is gone forever. The Black Fleet hunts you. Your Flagship must survive.

title: Scallywags Demo
description: Set sail with a ragtag group of Scallywags in a strategic pirate crew‑management roguelike. Hunt down the infamous Aces, plunder their treasures, and forge your story one chaotic voyage at a time. Every run is a fresh adventure, and every victory brings you closer to becoming a true Pirate Legend.

title: Fish Lab Demo
description: A short incremental game where you collect fish for your lab. Upgrade by making discoveries. Synced to music.

title: Resurface Demo
description: Escape the ocean depths in this casual incremental mining game. Mine, upgrade, and explore as your strength grows to crazy proportions!

title: Choppy Waves Demo
description: Choppy Waves is an online co-op party game for up to 4 players where you run a floating bar on the open ocean, mixing drinks and serving customers while waves send everyone sliding across the deck.

title: Prerolled Demo
description: Sell prerolled dice to make crazy money in this silly roguelite incremental puzzle mix-up. Pack dice in boxes, make absurd combos and happily overcharge your quirky clients!

title: Cold Decree Demo
description: Cold Decree is an atmospheric detective game that puts you in charge of a forensic laboratory. Scrutinize unsolved case files, analyze objects, and manually query the technical data within massive databases. Stop guessing; identify the perpetrator using only concrete evidence.

title: Crownseeker Demo
description: Hunt relics by day and night across a fog-shrouded world. Manage hunger. Gear up. Outlast or defeat what's hunting you. Collect all the relics — and the Crown appears. If you survive long enough to claim it.

title: Battle Boss Demo
description: Manage your very own battlemon gym! In this demo, experience a few days in the life of a Battle Boss, where it's your job to battle challengers and manage your gym!

title: Deep Sea Fish: Hidden World Demo
description: A short incremental fishing game where you catch fish, earn gold, and unlock powerful upgrades to explore the deep sea.

title: AirDrive Demo
description: Defend the last stronghold on a ravaged Earth against relentless enemies. Take control of your fighter jet with your whole body and face the overwhelming waves of foes. AirDrive is a defense motion-action roguelite featuring endless dogfights, diverse parts, and webcam-based motion controls.

title: Sloop Demo
description: A fast-paced, sea-faring, adventure where you’ll have to learn to turn. Brave the waters in the demo now!

title: 论道聊斋 Demo
description: 以《聊斋》为灵感的中国志怪剧情游戏。以章节形式体验一个个独立的聊斋故事，在文字对话、事件触发与剧情推进中，走入充满人心、执念与因果的东方怪谈世界。
